text: // Positive: bare <button> without type, inside form — defaults to submit
// Positive: <button onClick={x}> without type — defaults to submit
const handleClick = () => console.log("clicked");
// Negative: <button type="button"> — explicit type, must NOT match
const handleClick = () => console.log("clicked");

// Canonical positive: <Ctx.Provider value={{...}}> inline literal
import { createContext } from "react";
const AuthContext = createContext<AuthCtx | null>(null);
const user = "alice";
const login = () => {};
const logout = () => {};

// Negative: <Ctx.Provider value={memoizedValue}> via useMemo
import { createContext, useMemo } from "react";
const ThemeContext = createContext<{ mode: string } | null>(null);
const memoizedValue = useMemo(() => ({ mode: "dark" }), []);

// Canonical positive: useState(props.X) + useEffect that syncs setX(props.X)
import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
const [name, setName] = useState(props.name);

// Negative: useState(props.X) used as one-time seed, no syncing useEffect
import { useState } from "react";
const [value, setValue] = useState(props.initial);
// Linear 3-level chain: Root → Middle → Leaf, depth(Leaf) = 2
// Recursive component: TreeNode renders TreeNode (cycle)
// Positive: target="_blank" without rel — tabnabbing risk
// Negative: target="_blank" with proper rel — postFilter must drop
